name: Sales Representative
description: Sales Representative - Frontline selling and customer relationships
context: The Sales Representative is on the frontlines selling to customers daily. They evaluate based on whether it helps them have better conversations, overcome objections, and close deals.

alwaysAsks: How do I explain this to customers?
How do we compare to competitors?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through practical selling lens. Needs tools that work in real sales conversations.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on sales enablement value, ease of explanation, objection handling, and competitive advantage.
